text.title: Churn Cohort Analysis Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Churn Cohort Analysis output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: the 1-2 segments getting deeper attention next quarter

forbidden.pattern: save_flow tested without a control group
cohort_table aggregates all users without activation segmentation
leading_indicators absent — only lagging cancellation signals
review_quarter older than 6 months without re-run

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: cohort_table populated with a typed value
leading_indicators populated with a typed value
save_flows populated with a typed value
review_quarter populated with a typed value
next_quarter_focus populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
